nasb.text: “For behold, I am commanding, And I will shake the house of Israel among all nations As grain is shaken in a sieve, But not a kernel will fall to the ground.

esv.text: “For behold, I will command, and shake the house of Israel among all the nations as one shakes with a sieve, but no pebble shall fall to the earth.

cnv.text: 耶和華說：“看哪！我必下令， 我必在列國中篩以色列家， 好像人用篩子篩穀， 但穀粒不會落在地上。

ccb.text: “因为我要下令在列国中筛以色列家， 就像人筛谷物，一粒石子也不会落在地上。
